vars.name: PARSER_OCR_MODE
vars.description: Controls when OCR is triggered. auto: only for sparse pages. off: never. force: always. required: fail if OCR fails.

vars.name: PARSER_OCR_LANGS
vars.description: Tesseract language codes (e.g. 'eng', 'spa+eng'). Empty means auto-detect.

vars.name: PARSER_OCR_MAX_ATTEMPTS
vars.description: Maximum OCR retry attempts per page before accepting the best candidate.

vars.name: PARSER_OCR_TEMP_ROOT
vars.description: Directory for temporary OCR render images. Uses system temp if unset.

vars.name: VERAPDF_FLAVOUR
vars.description: veraPDF validation flavour. ua1 = PDF/UA-1, a1a = PDF/A-1a, etc.

vars.name: VALIDATOR_JAVA_HOME
vars.description: Path to Java installation for the validator. Falls back to JAVA_HOME, then bundled Java.

vars.name: VALIDATOR_JAVA_PATH
vars.description: Explicit path to the java executable used by the validator.

vars.name: VALIDATOR_JAVAC_PATH
vars.description: Explicit path to the javac executable for compiling validator Java helpers.

vars.name: VERAPDF_PATH
vars.description: Explicit path to the veraPDF CLI executable. Auto-discovered under vendor/ if unset.

vars.name: PIPELINE_DATA_ROOT
vars.description: Root directory for pipeline job data and intermediate artifacts.

vars.name: APP_RUNTIME_ROOT
vars.description: Root directory for runtime build artifacts (compiled Java classes, caches).

vars.name: AGENT_MASTER_ENDPOINT
vars.description: URL of the master orchestrator endpoint for remote agent polling.

vars.name: AGENT_POLL_INTERVAL_MS
vars.description: How often (ms) the remote agent polls the master for new jobs.

vars.name: AGENT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS
vars.description: How often (ms) the remote agent sends heartbeat signals.

vars.name: AGENT_CHECKIN_INTERVAL_MS
vars.description: How often (ms) the agent checks in with the master for configuration updates.

vars.name: PIPELINE_JAVAC_PATH
vars.description: Explicit path to javac for compiling PDF writer Java helpers.

vars.name: OVERLAY_FONT_PATH
vars.description: Path to a TTF/OTF font file for overlay text. Uses bundled Noto Sans if unset.
